2177530.name: The Experiment
2177530.description:
This game is a chapter based indie horror game, where you try to find your Missing friend!

In this game you play as the protagonist John who has to find your missing friend, Billy. Billy worked at a lab and you heard that the lab recently was shut down for an unknown reason, so you suspect that they are connected in some form. You get a call from Billy, saying he needs your help with something at his hut, you drive to the hut expecting Billy there, but you find something else...

This game will have Some patches and updates with new chapters. Maybe some Dlc's. If you buy this early, your in for a treat, as I said its gonna get updated. With every update comes a new chapter, so be ready. One day you might just find your friend.

I'm gonna stop spoiling the entire game and let you enjoy it for yourself!
2177530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
